_schemaDescription: Risk Assessment – Heat Map sample payload. Universe-level view: 10 entities total, 8 scored. Color zones: Yellow/Medium Risk (8 entities). 2 entities unscored. All items in a single color zone.

_drillDownExamples.universe: This payload (all entities in audit universe)
_drillDownExamples.entity: If user clicks 'Corporate Communications' → viewContext.currentLevel becomes 'entity', itemType becomes 'layer', contextPath becomes 'Corporate Communications', colorDistribution shows layers of Corporate Communications
_drillDownExamples.layer: If user clicks 'Marketing Layer' → itemType becomes 'process', contextPath becomes 'Corporate Communications > Marketing Layer'
_drillDownExamples.process: If user clicks 'Brand Management' → itemType becomes 'risk', contextPath becomes 'Corporate Communications > Marketing Layer > Brand Management'

priorityItems.description: Top 3 entities by residual score requiring audit attention.
